title: helianthemum × hortense
intro: Helianthemum × hortense, also known as Rockrose or Dwarf Rockrose, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as wound healing, skin care, and immune system support. Helianthemum × hortense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat minor skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
